name: John Doe
history: Worked overseas and built a website related to that work. Recurrent pattern of starting new ideas and later abandoning projects when difficulties arise. Family-related difficulty involving his father; wrote a personal letter as part of a forgiveness process.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't succeed, I am a failure.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must always be in control to avoid failure.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of difficult tasks and situations.
situation: Working on a personal project involving the development of a website.
auto_thought: I can't handle this; it's too much for me.
behavior: Procrastination and eventual abandonment of the project.
